prompt:
Prompt 1, Dreamy Kawaii Travel Scrapbook Style
A highly detailed kawaii-inspired travel journal scene featuring a trendy young woman waiting on a quiet Japanese railway platform at sunset. She wears a cozy blush-pink sherpa jacket layered over a crisp white blouse, a vintage denim skirt, sheer black tights, fluffy winter ankle boots, retro ivory oval sunglasses, and a sleek black shoulder crossbody bag. The composition is filled with decorative scrapbook elements including taped instant film photos, hand-drawn doodles, pastel sticky memos, tiny butterflies, sparkles, floral stickers, café cups, travel stamps, ribbon details, and soft cherry blossom petals floating through the air. Golden cinematic sunlight pours across the platform, creating dreamy highlights and delicate shadows. Mixed-media aesthetic combining realistic fashion photography with layered illustrated sticker art, textured paper overlays, and handmade collage details. Feminine Pinterest-inspired atmosphere, cozy Japanese travel mood, soft pastel color palette, ultra-realistic facial features and fabric textures, whimsical yet polished social-media editorial look, ultra high-resolution.

Prompt 2, Handmade Miniature Paper Diorama Style
An enchanting miniature paper-crafted diorama of a stylish girl standing at a nostalgic Japanese train station, built entirely from layered cardstock, felt fabric textures, clay-style props, and handcrafted cut-paper scenery. The girl is dressed in a fluffy powder-pink fleece coat, white top, short denim skirt, dark tights, plush winter boots, vintage white sunglasses, and a compact black satchel bag. The station environment features tiny railway tracks, wooden beams, soft pastel storefronts, Japanese station signs, miniature flowers, lanterns, fluffy clouds, and decorative trees made from layered paper petals. Warm ambient evening lighting creates a cozy cinematic atmosphere with soft shadows and handcrafted depth. The entire scene feels like a stop-motion animation set mixed with a premium kawaii art installation. Rich tactile textures, visible paper-cut edges, whimsical handcrafted details, dreamy pastel tones, symmetrical composition, ultra-detailed studio-quality render, charming and nostalgic travel aesthetic.
